FROM

 minus
 select EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID = STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_EXPENDITURE_ITEMS_ALL)
